metadata.description: Tribed outreach system — IG, LinkedIn, cold email, and a LinkedIn MCP sequence pipeline

plugins.name: tribed-outreach
plugins.description: Full Tribed outreach: gift-first IG/LinkedIn/InMail openers, reply and objection handling, follow-up sequences, cold email, and LinkedIn connection-note + follow-up personalization with a daily IG+LinkedIn pipeline run through the LinkedIn MCP.
